query: SELECT signalType, COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) as uniqueTickers, COUNT(*) as totalRows FROM breakoutScans WHERE userId = 1 AND scannedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY signalType;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT signalType, COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) as uniqueTickers, COUNT(*) as totalRows FROM breakoutScans WHERE userId = 1 AND scannedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY signalType;
